title: YankMooM 12PCS Large Pull Bows,7 Inch Gift Wrapping Bows Large Satin Pull Bows for Gift Wrapping,Baskets Birthday Wedding Christmas Party Decorations (Green)
features: Durable Materials: Our reusable pull bows are made of polypropylene, which provides a comfortable touch and is not easily broken, making them very durable. They are non-toxic and odorless, ensuring a safe and reliable choice for gift packaging. It can be cleaned with water or reused

Exquisite Design: These bright colors and floral style design satin pull bows symbolize good wishes, adding a touch of elegance to your gift, with good decoration, leaving an unforgettable impression on the person you love
Quantity&Size: You will receive 12 beautiful large gift wrap bows, with a finished size of approximately 18 cm x 20 cm/7 inches x 7.9 inches (W * L), suitable for gift decoration in various occasions

Easy to Use: Just find two thin ribbons,pinch them with your fingers and push them upwards. The outer ribbon can slide upwards, forming an elegant and beautiful large bow in a few seconds. Then tie a knot to the item you want to decorate. Save time and energy while making your gift look stunning. After use, it can also be restored and reused

Wide Application: Exquisite flower pull bows are suitable for gift box packaging,flower packaging and decoration, gift basket decoration,Christmas decoration,and can also be used to decorate various parties,weddings and baby showers,making your important days full of romance and beauty
